visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a short beard, wearing a gray flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt with a 'C' logo, stands in front of a light purple studio wall. He speaks enthusiastically with active hand gestures. A red graphic with the text '日本首款' and a Japanese flag icon appears. (2) The scene uses fast-paced zoom-ins and zoom-outs. A large blue circular logo with a white Yen symbol and the text 'JPYC' is overlaid. Information cards with company details and Japanese text slide into the frame. (3) The man continues explaining as graphics showing a '1:1' ratio, scales, and a 10,000 Yen banknote appear. Yellow animated lines emphasize his speech. He points toward the center of the screen where the graphics manifest. (4) A series of icons representing various services—two people at a counter, a salary envelope, a credit card, and a tax icon—pop up around the man. He gestures toward each one as they appear sequentially. (5) The man 'holds' a graphic representing a fan of Yen banknotes. Large text '要打造規模 10兆日圓' and '新日圓經濟圈' appear in bold colors. The background remains a consistent, brightly lit studio setting with a clean, flat aesthetic.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Slogan]: 日本首款. [Subtitle]: 日本首款日圓穩定幣. (2) [Logo]: JPYC. [Slogan]: 正式登場. [Subtitle]: JPYC正式登場! 由東京金融科技公司 JPYC Inc. 發行的. (3) [Slogan]: 受付開始! [Subtitle]: 已經在10/27這個穩定幣正式上線. (4) [Logo]: EX JPYC CHANGE. [Subtitle]: 並且同步開放官方平台 JPYC EX. (5) [Slogan]: 1:1. [Subtitle]: 這款穩定幣可以用1:1去兌換日圓. (6) [Slogan]: 有日本公債 全額擔保. [Subtitle]: 背後是由日圓存款還有日本公債全額擔保. (7) [Slogan]: 《資金決済法》. [Subtitle]: 轉帳速度快而且手續費低還符合日本的資金決済法它這個規範. (8) [Variety]: 便利商店支付. [Subtitle]: 目前JPYC已經應用於便利商店支付. (9) [Variety]: 給料 薪資結算. [Subtitle]: 企業付款還有薪資結算. (10) [Variety]: 動漫創作者收款. [Subtitle]: 動漫創作者收款. (11) [Variety]: 信用卡繳費. [Subtitle]: 信用卡繳費. (12) [Variety]: 稅 報稅工具. [Subtitle]: 報稅工具等等. (13) [Slogan]: 從線下到Web3一網打盡. [Subtitle]: 從線下到Web3一網打盡. (14) [Slogan]: 要打造規模10兆日圓. [Subtitle]: JPYC目標在3年內要打造規模10兆日圓的一個日圓. (15) [Slogan]: 新日圓經濟圈. [Subtitle]: 打造一個新日圓經濟圈成為連接實體經濟跟加密世界的關鍵基礎設施啊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with glasses, a gray flat cap, and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, solid light purple or light blue studio wall with minimal decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice begins speaking rapidly with clear articulation over an upbeat electronic BGM track. A 'whoosh' SFX signals the start of the presentation. (2) As graphics appear, multiple 'ding' and 'pop' SFX are triggered, precisely synchronized with the visual overlays. The speaker's pitch remains high and engaging. (3) The background music maintains a steady 128 BPM pulse. The speaker increases his intensity while explaining the 1:1 ratio. A series of percussive UI 'click' sounds are heard. (4) During the listing of use cases, each new point is punctuated by a short, sharp 'blip' SFX. The BGM remains consistent in volume, sitting clearly beneath the prominent vocal track. (5) The speaker concludes with an authoritative yet excited tone. A final musical swell and a crisp transition SFX mark the end of the video segment as it loops.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Definition -> Features -> Use Cases -> Future Goal
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and promote 'JPYC,' the first Japanese Yen stablecoin, to a Chinese-speaking audience interested in cryptocurrency and fintech. It highlights the coin's stability (1:1 with Yen), regulatory compliance, and wide range of practical applications from daily shopping to Web3 infrastructure, framed as a significant development in the digital economy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a dedicated presentation of a specific financial product (JPYC) including its issuer, launch date, and specific benefits, presented by a known tech influencer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social-media-native tech news clip with high information density and professional audio-visual synchronization.
